homepage.heroSubline: Summit Towing delivers fast, reliable service when you need it most. We're on call 24/7 to handle breakdowns, accidents, and recoveries across Tulsa.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Summit Towing started with two trucks and a commitment to honest service. We've grown by treating every call like it's our neighbor in need.
Our operators train for Tulsa's extreme weather - from summer breakdowns on Route 66 to winter spinouts near the Gathering Place. No job is too complex for our fleet.
We support local first responders and sponsor youth sports teams. When tornadoes hit, our trucks are often first on scene clearing roads.

valueProps.title: 15-Minute Average Response
valueProps.description: Our strategically located fleet means help arrives fast, even during rush hour on the Broken Arrow Expressway.

valueProps.title: All-Weather Recovery
valueProps.description: Specialized equipment handles icy hill recoveries in Maple Ridge and flood rescues near the Arkansas River.

valueProps.title: Damage-Free Guarantee
valueProps.description: Certified operators use the latest wheel-lift technology to protect your vehicle during transport.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees - we provide upfront quotes and accept all major insurance providers.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call 555-TOW-R91 for immediate dispatch. Our team is standing by 24 hours a day.

services.name: Emergency Towing
services.shortDescription: 24/7 rapid response for breakdowns and accidents across Tulsa.
services.description:
When your car quits on the Riverside Drive curve or you're in a fender-bender near Woodland Hills Mall, our emergency towing gets you moving fast.

Our dispatch center monitors weather alerts and traffic patterns, positioning trucks strategically for quick response. All operators carry jump packs, fuel, and basic tools to attempt roadside fixes before towing.

We handle everything from compact cars to full-size pickups stranded in Brookside's narrow streets. After dark, all trucks have amber warning lights and reflective gear for safe nighttime recoveries.
process: Step 1: Call our 24/7 dispatch - provide location and vehicle details
Step 2: Receive ETA and quote confirmation via text
Step 3: Operator arrives with appropriate equipment for your vehicle
Step 4: Secure transport to your chosen destination

faq.question: Do you tow after major accidents?
faq.answer: Yes, we work with Tulsa PD to clear wrecked vehicles safely. Our operators are certified in post-collision stabilization and fluid containment.

faq.question: What if I need a tow during a tornado warning?
faq.answer: We run emergency service until roads become impassable. During active warnings, we prioritize life-threatening situations alongside first responders.

services.name: Long Distance Transport
services.shortDescription: Safe vehicle relocation throughout Oklahoma and neighboring states.
services.description:
Moving a classic car from the Brady Arts District to Dallas? Transferring a work truck between job sites? Our long-distance service protects your investment mile after mile.

We use enclosed trailers for collectibles and open carriers with advanced tie-down systems for daily drivers. Each route includes pre-trip inspections and real-time GPS tracking you can monitor.

For Tulsa residents wintering elsewhere, we offer seasonal vehicle transport to popular destinations like Colorado and Arizona. Our team knows how to secure vehicles properly for mountain passes and desert highways.
process: Step 1: Schedule pickup window (available 6am-10pm daily)
Step 2: Complete vehicle condition report together
Step 3: Continuous location updates during transit
Step 4: Scheduled delivery with signature confirmation

faq.question: How do you protect cars from hail damage?
faq.answer: Our weather monitoring system reroutes shipments when severe storms strike. Enclosed trailers are always available for high-value vehicles.

faq.question: Can you transport non-running vehicles?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We're equipped with hydraulic lifts and winches to load vehicles that won't start.

services.name: Motorcycle Recovery
services.shortDescription: Specialized transport for bikes and ATVs in the Tulsa area.
services.description:
Broken down after a ride through Turkey Mountain? Our motorcycle recovery service prevents further damage to your bike during transport.

We use soft straps and canyon dancer systems that won't scratch forks or frames. Each bike gets individual attention - no stacking or improper tie-downs like some general towing services use.

For Harley riders leaving rallies at the Expo Square, we offer scheduled group transport. Our trailers have chocks for up to six bikes with room for gear. After track days at Hallett Motor Racing Circuit, we provide track-side pickup by appointment.
process: Step 1: Confirm bike make/model and condition
Step 2: Dispatch trailer with appropriate tie-down system
Step 3: Professional loading using protective pads
Step 4: Secure delivery to repair shop or storage

faq.question: Do you transport dirt bikes?
faq.answer: Yes, our trailers have ramp access and individual wheel chocks for off-road machines. We can handle muddy bikes straight from the trails.

faq.question: What if I dropped my bike in a parking lot?
faq.answer: Our operators are trained to upright fallen motorcycles safely before loading. We carry spare levers and basic tools for roadside repairs when possible.

services.name: Heavy Duty Towing
services.shortDescription: Commercial and industrial towing for Tulsa's toughest jobs.
services.description:
When a semi jackknifes on I-44 or construction equipment needs relocating, our heavy-duty fleet gets the job done right.

Our 50-ton rotators can upright overturned trucks on Tulsa's industrial east side. Lowboy trailers transport backhoes and skid steers between job sites in Midtown's tight spaces. Every operator holds CDL and advanced recovery certifications.

We work directly with logistics companies at the Tulsa Port of Catoosa, offering 24/7 availability for stranded rigs. For fleet managers, we provide scheduled maintenance towing with detailed service records.
process: Step 1: Assess vehicle weight and recovery challenges
Step 2: Dispatch appropriately sized equipment
Step 3: Secure load using DOT-approved methods
Step 4: Transport to designated facility

faq.question: Can you tow school buses?
faq.answer: Yes, we're contracted with several Tulsa-area school districts for emergency bus recovery. Our equipment won't damage air brake systems.

faq.question: Do you offer impound towing?
faq.answer: We provide contract towing for several municipalities, following all state regulations for vehicle impounds.

services.name: Roadside Assistance
services.shortDescription: Fast help for lockouts, jump starts, and flat tires in Tulsa.
services.description:
Locked your keys in the car at Utica Square? Battery dead after the ice storm? Our roadside assistance solves common problems without a tow.

Every service truck carries industrial jump starters that work on diesel pickups and luxury sedans alike. We stock most common tire sizes for repairs on the spot. For complex issues, our mechanics can often diagnose problems to save you repair shop time.

Membership plans include unlimited service calls within Tulsa County. We're particularly busy after Thunder games downtown when fans discover dead batteries in cold parking garages.
process: Step 1: Describe your vehicle and problem
Step 2: Receive estimated arrival time
Step 3: Technician attempts repair onsite
Step 4: Tow arranged if problem can't be fixed

faq.question: Can you help with a Tesla that won't start?
faq.answer: Our technicians train on EV-specific procedures. We carry specialized tools to access Tesla jump points without damage.

faq.question: Do you bring gas for out-of-fuel calls?
faq.answer: Yes, we deliver enough fuel to reach the nearest station. Payment is required for fuel but there's no extra delivery charge.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Had a blowout on the BA Expressway at 2am. Summit had a truck to me in 12 minutes flat. Operator changed my spare in the rain so I wouldn't have to pay for a tow. These guys are Tulsa's finest.

reviews.name: Danielle K.
reviews.text: They transported my Indian Scout from the dealer to my Brookside home with perfect care. Used the right straps and even covered it without me asking when rain started. Will use them for all my bike transport needs.

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: Our dump truck slid off an icy job site near 71st and Memorial. Summit's rotator had it back on the road in under an hour. Their operator knew exactly how to position without tearing up the muddy yard. Professional through and through.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Locked my toddler and keys in the car outside the Gathering Place playground. Summit's guy arrived in 18 minutes and got us in without a scratch. Calm under pressure when I was panicking - worth every penny.

reviews.name: James P.
reviews.text: Shipped my restored '68 Camaro to Barrett-Jackson in Phoenix. Summit's enclosed trailer was climate controlled and driver sent me photos at every stop. Car arrived cleaner than when it left my garage in Cherry Street.

reviews.name: Tyrone W.
reviews.text: Hit black ice and ended up in a ditch near 41st and Yale. Tow operator brought me coffee while waiting for the wrecker and explained exactly how they'd recover my truck without more damage. These guys treat you like family.
